title: Upgrade automation mirrored status columns "When Status changes to something and only if Status is something, then move item to group"
excerpt:
Hey guys! 
We need the automations: “When Status changes to something and only if Status is something, then move item to group”. 
Can you tell when this function may be available?  It will make our work much easier! 
Tha…

posts.author: Diogo (Diogo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys!

We need the automations: “When Status changes to something and only if Status is something, then move item to group”.

Can you tell when this function may be available? It will make our work much easier!

Thanks a lot

posts.author: rondis (Rondi Schei)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would add the following automation ability to this request:
If a status changes to something, and if a status is something, then change another status to something.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Better yet, just support mirror columns like regular columns for all automations. They’ve proven they can do it by the status changes, so its possible.

posts.author: Diogo (Diogo)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates here???
